_doc: Schema 3 (SearchPlanningContext) gap analysis. Compares spec against actual buildSearchPlanningContext() output (searchPlanningContext.js:288-377) and downstream consumer buildSearchPlan() (searchPlanBuilder.js:263-417). Updated 2026-03-16 — all body text aligned with code after gap fixes.

_plan_alignment._question: Are we following the plans to achieve 00-PRODUCT-GOAL.md?
_plan_alignment.answer: YES. The pipeline brain is now connected to its memory. Schema 3 computes anti-garbage intelligence (domains_tried, host_classes_tried, evidence_classes_tried, no_value_attempts, search_exhaustion) and inlines catalog metadata (source_target, content_target, search_intent, host_class). Schema 4 buildSearchPlan sends ALL of these to the LLM in the payload (searchPlanBuilder.js:298-338). The feedback loop from buildFieldHistories → Schema 2 → Schema 3 → Schema 4 LLM payload is complete.

current_status.anti_garbage_signals: CONNECTED — searchPlanBuilder.js:313-335 sends domains_tried_union, host_classes_tried_union, evidence_classes_tried_union, no_value_attempts, preferred_content_types_union, aliases_union, weak_field_keys, conflict_field_keys, host_class, source_target, search_intent, urls_examined_count, query_count to the LLM
current_status.catalog_metadata: INLINED — searchPlanningContext.js:249-259 inlines label, desc, source_target, content_target, search_intent, host_class from catalog into each focus_group
current_status.search_exhaustion: ACTIVE — searchPlanningContext.js:143-149 + 204-206 + 232-237 compute exhaustion and move fully-exhausted groups to hold phase
current_status.aliases: FLOWING — searchPlanningContext.js:175,214,282 aggregates aliases_union per group; searchPlanBuilder.js:325 sends to LLM
current_status.feedback_loop: COMPLETE — buildFieldHistories → previousFieldHistories → computeNeedSet → field.history → buildSearchPlanningContext → focus_groups unions → buildSearchPlan LLM payload

_spec_vs_actual_summary.top_level_key_match: MATCH — all spec keys present, plus field_priority_map (used by Schema 4 for bundle fields[] derivation)

needset._note: Slim projection of Schema 2 output. Built in searchPlanningContext.js:347-354. Heavy fields[] passthrough removed to reduce payload size.

missing_critical_fields.status: MATCH — consumed by searchPlanBuilder.js:306 (sent to LLM)

unresolved_fields.status: MATCH — not consumed by planner (per-group unresolved_field_keys used instead)

existing_queries.status: MATCH — consumed by searchPlanBuilder.js:337,381 (sent to LLM + used for dedup)

planner_limits._note: Derived from runtime config in searchPlanningContext.js:57-76 (derivePlannerLimits function).

discoveryEnabled.status: MATCH - discovery seed planning is treated as a runtime invariant

discoveryMaxQueries.status: MATCH - sent to the Schema 4 LLM payload and used for planner capping

maxUrlsPerProduct.status: MATCH - sent to the Schema 4 LLM payload

llmModelPlan.status: MATCH - resolved needset planner model snapshot

group_catalog._note: Static metadata map built from GROUP_DEFAULTS + fieldGroupsData. Still emitted as separate top-level key but now ALSO inlined into focus_groups. Catalog is redundant but harmless.
group_catalog._source: searchPlanningContext.js:108-134 (buildGroupCatalog). GROUP_DEFAULTS has 11 mouse-specific groups. resolveGroupMeta checks fieldGroupsData first for category-aware overrides.

focus_groups._note: Derived from Schema 2 fields[] grouped by group_key. Built in searchPlanningContext.js:151-285 (buildFocusGroup). Catalog metadata inlined. Anti-garbage unions from non-accepted fields only. Sorted by phase→priority→key.

label.actual: MATCH — searchPlanningContext.js:254 — cat.label || groupKey (inlined from catalog)

search_exhausted_field_keys.status: MATCH — drives phase=hold when all non-accepted fields are exhausted

exact_match_count.consumed_by: searchPlanBuilder.js not directly — used for Schema 4 panel

query_terms_union.actual: searchPlanningContext.js:275 — unionSorted() from non-accepted fields only

domain_hints_union.actual: searchPlanningContext.js:276 — unionSorted() from non-accepted fields only
domain_hints_union.consumed_by: searchPlanBuilder.js:289,323 — dead domains filtered then sent to LLM (capped to 5)

preferred_content_types_union.actual: searchPlanningContext.js:277 — unionSorted() from non-accepted fields only

existing_queries_union.actual: searchPlanningContext.js:278 — unionSorted() from non-accepted fields only
existing_queries_union.consumed_by: searchPlanBuilder.js:290-293,324 — dead hashes filtered then sent to LLM (capped to 5)

domains_tried_union.actual: searchPlanningContext.js:279 — unionSorted() from non-accepted fields only

host_classes_tried_union.actual: searchPlanningContext.js:280 — unionSorted() from non-accepted fields only

evidence_classes_tried_union.actual: searchPlanningContext.js:281 — unionSorted() from non-accepted fields only

aliases_union.actual: searchPlanningContext.js:282 — unionSorted() from non-accepted fields only

phase.actual: searchPlanningContext.js:236-247 — derived from hasUnresolved + priority + hasCoreGroupAnywhere + allFieldsExhausted
phase.consumed_by: searchPlanBuilder.js:286 — filters groups to now|next for LLM

field_priority_map._note: Map of field_key → required_level. Built in searchPlanningContext.js:332-335. Used by Schema 4 assembleSchema4() to derive bundle.fields[].bucket.

learning._note: Optional passthrough from external learning stores. searchPlanningContext.js:375 — learning || null.

previous_round_fields._note: Optional passthrough for round-over-round delta computation. searchPlanningContext.js:376.

_gap_summary._history: All 12 gaps (PROFILE-GAP-1 through PROFILE-GAP-12) resolved. Catalog metadata inlined into focus_groups. Anti-garbage signals sent to LLM. aliases_union aggregated. Search exhaustion drives phase=hold. base_model/aliases in run block. Union sets filtered to non-accepted fields. resolveGroupMeta checks fieldGroupsData. urls_examined_count/query_count aggregated. previous_round_fields consumed by computeDeltas. key standardized. llmPlanApiKey removed from spec. weak/conflict/missing_critical sent to LLM.
